title: Chamaesyce longistyla
taxonomy: Chamaesyce longistyla is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It belongs to the genus Chamaesyce, which comprises a group of succulent plants native to various parts of the world. Chamaesyce longistyla is further categorized within the subfamily Acalyphoideae. The classification of Chamaesyce longistyla is based on its botanical characteristics and molecular analysis. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships within the Euphorbiaceae family.

Traditionally, Chamaesyce longistyla has been used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
